fields.label: Learner
fields.description: Lookup to the learner Contact this career review is for. Required. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: Select the learner this career review belongs to.

fields.label: Review Mode
fields.description: What materials Penny reviewed. Values: resume / linkedin / both. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: What Penny reviewed: resume, LinkedIn profile, or both.

fields.label: Readiness Label
fields.description: Penny overall readiness assessment. e.g. Strong Candidate / Developing / Needs Work. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: Penny overall readiness label for this learner.

fields.label: Area Scores
fields.description: JSON scores for 5 dimensions: Experience Relevance, Credentials, Professional Presence, Communication Clarity, Career Trajectory. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: Stores Penny dimension scores as JSON. Set automatically at review time.

fields.label: Feedback JSON
fields.description: Structured AI feedback per dimension stored as JSON. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: Stores Penny detailed feedback as JSON. Set automatically at review time.

fields.label: Target Role
fields.description: The role the learner is targeting at time of review. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: The role this learner is targeting. Used to contextualise the career review feedback.

fields.label: Reviewed At
fields.description: Date and time this career review was completed. Required. GetCareerReview action checks if within 30 days of today. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: The date and time this review was completed. Set automatically.
